word: H2994 - יְבֵמֶת - Yᵉbêmeth - yeb-ay'-meth - Brother's wife

sections.paragraph:
Original: יבמת

Transliteration: yebêmeth

Phonetic: yeb-ay'-meth

BDB Definition:

  1. sister-in-law, brother's wife, brother's widow

Origin: participle of H2992

TWOT entry: 836b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
